task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the Nx Witness VMS interface at https://localhost:7001.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the Nx Witness VMS web administration interface or API interface (e.g., Swagger UI) loaded at the URL https://localhost:7001.

task_completion.description: Verify the SMTP Server Host and Port are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'SMTP Server' or 'Host' field (or 'smtpHost' API parameter) contains 'smtp.securecorp.net' and the 'Port' field (or 'smtpPort' API parameter) contains '587'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Connection Type is set to TLS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Connection Type' or 'Secure Connection' setting is set to 'tls' or 'TLS' (or 'smtpConnectionType' is set to 'tls' in the API).

task_completion.description: Verify the Sender Email Address is configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'System Email', 'Sender Email', 'From' field (or 'emailFrom' API parameter) contains 'vms-alerts@securecorp.net'.

task_completion.description: Verify the SMTP Username and Password are provided.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'User' or 'Username' field (or 'smtpUser') contains 'vms-alerts@securecorp.net' and the 'Password' field (or 'smtpPassword') is filled with 'S3cur3Ma!l#2024' or masked characters.

task_completion.description: Verify the settings have been saved or applied.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' or 'Apply' button has been clicked, a success message is visible in the UI, or a '200 OK' response is shown if the API was used.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual Nx Witness VMS web interface or API.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the genuine Nx Witness VMS web interface or API documentation UI at localhost:7001, not a local HTML file, text editor, or mock interface.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) are not open and actively modifying the DOM to display the correct values.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually typed or pasted the settings into the appropriate input fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values are present inside standard input fields, dropdowns, or API request bodies within the application, rather than just being written in a notepad or terminal window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring SMTP settings in Nx Witness VMS. Expected values: Host = 'smtp.securecorp.net', Port = 587, Connection Type = 'tls', Sender Email = 'vms-alerts@securecorp.net', Username = 'vms-alerts@securecorp.net', Password = 'S3cur3Ma!l#2024'. If the agent uses the REST API (/rest/v1/system/settings) instead of the standard web UI, look for the corresponding JSON keys: smtpHost, smtpPort, smtpConnectionType, emailFrom, smtpUser, smtpPassword.
